relevant_measure: Estimated resident population; natural increase; net overseas migration contribution
definitional_limitations: ERP is revised over time; reference date must be captured.

relevant_measure: NOM; arrivals; departures; visa/country/age/sex where available
definitional_limitations: NOM residence concept differs from visa grants and stocks.

relevant_measure: Permanent; temporary; skilled; family; humanitarian; student visa categories
definitional_limitations: Administrative visa measures do not directly equal NOM.
Seasonally adjusted/trend/original series must not be mixed.

dataset_or_publication: Australian National Accounts: National Income, Expenditure and Product
relevant_measure: GDP growth; GDP per capita; national income; productivity-related aggregates
definitional_limitations: Chain-volume and current-price measures require separate handling.
Monthly indicator is not the full quarterly CPI basket.
Completions, commencements and approvals are not interchangeable.

organisation: National Housing Supply and Affordability Council
dataset_or_publication: State of the Housing System / supply forecasts
definitional_limitations: Forecast assumptions must be separated from observed ABS data.

dataset_or_publication: Cash Rate Target / Statement on Monetary Policy
relevant_measure: Interest rates and macro outlook context
definitional_limitations: Interest rates are not currently modelled directly but materially affect housing.

relevant_measure: GDP; population; migration; fiscal outlook; ageing
definitional_limitations: Forecasts are government assumptions, not observed baseline facts.
Commonwealth only; state/local finances require separate sources.

dataset_or_publication: Fiscal sustainability and policy costing reports
relevant_measure: Budget sensitivities; costing methods; fiscal assumptions
definitional_limitations: Useful for relationships and methods, not every baseline value.

organisation: Australian Institute of Health and Welfare
dataset_or_publication: Health expenditure / health workforce / aged care reporting
definitional_limitations: Health data definitions differ by service and government level.
Best used for relationships/ranges rather than single observed values.

relevant_measure: Infrastructure demand; costs; market capacity; project pipeline
definitional_limitations: Costs vary by geography and asset class; avoid a single unsupported coefficient.

column11: Population attribution requires transformation and uncertainty.

relevant_measure: Energy generation; demand; reliability; transition assumptions
definitional_limitations: Energy data must be mapped carefully to environmental/resource outcomes.
